title: tragacantha humilis
intro: Tragacantha humilis, also known as the dwarf or low burr clover, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues. Tragacantha humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
